public.heroHeading: Submit or track a complaint to the Ministry of Planning and Development.
public.heroBody: Submit a complaint, receive a reference number, and track progress online.
public.heroBodyExtended: Our citizen-centered platform ensures transparency and accountability in administrative processes.
public.processSubtitle: A transparent four-step journey from submission to final resolution.

submission.title: Submission
submission.body: Provide details and supporting files for your complaint.

review.title: Review
review.body: MoPD validates and assigns the complaint to an officer.

investigation.title: Investigation
investigation.body: Assigned staff gathers evidence and resolves the issue.

resolution.title: Resolution
resolution.body: Final decision and resolution outcome are communicated.

public.readyBody: File a new complaint or track an existing case with your reference number.
public.footerDescription: Ministry of Planning and Development (MoPD) Complaint Management System. Building a more responsive administration.
public.footerCopyright: © 2026 Ministry of Planning and Development (MoPD). All rights reserved.
public.phase0Note: Foundation build in progress — staff and admin surfaces ship in later phases.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use your MoPD CMS account credentials.
auth.sessionExpiredBody: Your session has ended. Sign in again to continue.
auth.forbiddenBody: You do not have permission to view this page.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you requested does not exist.
errors.genericBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

complaintSubmit.contactIntro: Your personal details are kept confidential. We recommend providing email or phone so we can send your reference number and status updates. Save your reference number after submit even if you skip contact details.
complaintSubmit.reviewIntro: Please review your complaint carefully before submitting. You can go back to edit any section.

info.privacyBody: Your data is protected under the National Data Protection Law. We only share details with relevant departments.
info.slaBody: Standard responses are typically provided within 3–5 working days from submission.

fields.subject: Complaint subject
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Please provide specific details about the problem, including dates and any immediate risks…
fields.orgUnitHint: Choose the MoPD directorate best suited to handle this complaint.
fields.name: Full name
fields.emailHint: Optional, recommended for reference recovery and status updates.
fields.phoneHint: Optional, recommended if you do not provide email. SMS confirmation is not available yet.
fields.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data
fields.consentDetail: By checking this box, you agree that MoPD may securely store and process the provided information in accordance with our Privacy Policy to handle this complaint.

errors.optionsFailed: Could not load complaint categories. You can still fill in other details, then retry.
errors.optionsPartial: Could not refresh the latest categories. Showing previously loaded options.
errors.categoriesUnavailable: Categories could not be loaded. You can still continue and submit without selecting one.
errors.orgUnitsUnavailable: Responsible offices are unavailable until the list loads.
errors.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 5 characters.
errors.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 20 characters.
errors.locationRequired: Please select a region and zone.
errors.consentRequired: You must provide consent to submit the complaint.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit complaint. Please try again.

success.title: Submission Successful
success.body: Your complaint has been securely transmitted to the Ministry of Planning and Development. It is currently queued for initial review.
success.next1: Our administrative triage team will evaluate your submission within 24 to 48 business hours.
success.next2Email: A confirmation with your reference number and track link was sent to {email}.
success.next2PhoneOnly: Save your reference number below. SMS confirmation is not available yet.
success.next2None: No contact details were provided — you must save this reference number to track your complaint.
success.keepSafeBody: You may need it to track your complaint or recover it later. Store it somewhere secure (notes app, email to yourself, or a photo).
success.next3: Use your reference on the track page to check status updates at any time.
success.evidencePrompt: You may optionally attach supporting documents now. Evidence can only be uploaded after your complaint has been registered.

evidence.title: Evidence & Attachments
evidence.intro: Upload supporting documents, images, or files related to your complaint.
evidence.dropHint: or click to browse from your device
evidence.notesPlaceholder: Provide any context about the attached files…
evidence.notesHint: Notes are stored with your complaint record when supported.
evidence.partialFailure: Some files could not be uploaded. Remove failed files or try again.
evidence.sessionExpired: The evidence upload window has expired.
evidence.sessionExpiredHint: Your complaint {reference} was submitted successfully. Contact support if you still need to attach files.
evidence.completeBody: Your files were uploaded successfully for complaint {reference}.

complaintTrack.title: Track Complaint Status
complaintTrack.intro: Enter your unique reference number to securely check the status and updates of your submitted complaint.
complaintTrack.subject: Subject

progress.label: Overall progress
progress.errorHint: We could not find this reference. Check the number and try again.

received.title: Complaint received
received.body: Your complaint enters the MoPD system with a reference number.

review.title: Under review
review.body: MoPD reviews your submission and assigns it to the responsible team.

investigation.title: In investigation
investigation.body: Staff investigate the case, prepare a response, and complete internal review.

response.title: Response issued
response.body: You receive MoPD's response and may provide feedback or request an appeal.

statusDetail.SUBMITTED: Your complaint is registered in our system. A reference number has been issued so you can track progress here.
statusDetail.TRIAGE: MoPD is reviewing your submission, checking details, and deciding how your complaint should be handled.
statusDetail.ASSIGNED: Your complaint has been assigned to a responsible MoPD team or officer. They will take the next steps on your case.
statusDetail.IN_INVESTIGATION: Assigned staff are examining the facts and details of your complaint.
statusDetail.DRAFT_RESPONSE: MoPD is preparing a formal written response to your complaint.
statusDetail.QA_LEGAL_REVIEW: The draft response is being reviewed for quality and legal compliance before it is issued to you.
statusDetail.RESPONSE_ISSUED: MoPD has issued a formal response. Please review the outcome communicated to you.
statusDetail.AWAITING_FEEDBACK: MoPD is waiting for your feedback on the response. Your input may help close or continue the case.
statusDetail.APPEAL: An appeal or further review has been registered. Your complaint is being re-examined by MoPD.
statusDetail.CLOSED: This complaint is closed. No further routine updates are expected unless a separate appeal process still applies.

errors.title: Unable to load tracking
errors.notFound: No complaint found for that reference. Check the number and try again.
errors.generic: Could not load tracking information. Please try again.

complaintRecover.title: Recover your reference number
complaintRecover.intro: Enter the email or phone number you used when submitting your complaint. We will send a verification code if we find matching records.
complaintRecover.emailHint: Must match the email you provided at submission.
complaintRecover.phoneSmsHint: SMS recovery is not available yet. Use email if you provided one at submission.
complaintRecover.requestNote: If we have complaints for this contact, you will receive a code shortly. The same message is shown whether or not a match exists.
complaintRecover.otpIntro: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your contact method.
complaintRecover.noReferences: No complaints were found for this contact after verification.
complaintRecover.manualFallback: Did not use email or phone when you submitted?

errors.requestFailed: Could not send verification code. Try again later.
errors.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired code. Try again.

complaintRecoverManual.title: Manual reference recovery
complaintRecoverManual.intro: If you did not provide email or phone when submitting, describe your complaint so MoPD staff can locate it. Staff review is not instant — provide an email where we can send your reference number or the outcome.
complaintRecoverManual.contactEmailHint: We will email you when staff resolve this request (may take several business days).
complaintRecoverManual.successBody: Check your email for a confirmation. When staff finish reviewing, we will email you at the address you provided.

errors.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 5 characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait about an hour and try again, or use a different email if you were testing the form.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit your request. Try again.

recoveryInquiries.title: Reference recovery inquiries
recoveryInquiries.intro: Staff queue for citizens who could not use self-service recovery.
recoveryInquiries.subject: Subject fragment
